item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-02 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] CoreBunch/Instatic (+516 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Instatic is a modern self-hosted visual CMS - get it running in 1 minute Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +516，总 stars 2,060，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset (+1866 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video. Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1866，总 stars 8,571，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+16 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: Machine Learning Engineering Open Book Why it matters: RAG / Knowledge Base 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +16，前 3 日均值 6，加速度 2.7x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看数据接入、检索质量和 production workflow，而不是只看 demo 效果。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] HKUDS/Vibe-Trading (+919 stars/24h)

item.title: [sustained_hot] Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw (+390 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: 基于 AI Agent + MCP 工具链 + 渗透 Skill 编排， 配合大语言模型， 自然语言输入 → 自动完成「信息收集 → 漏洞发现 → 漏洞利用 → 报告生成」全流程。 Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +390，总 stars 1,626，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+1123 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1123，总 stars 31,044，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence (+697 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: 18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +697，总 stars 2,715，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] headroomlabs-ai/headroom (+646 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server. item.title: [sustained_hot] diegosouzapw/OmniRoute (+1131 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1131，总 stars 9,684，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low
